home.title: Welcome to User System
home.subtitle: Simple, secure, and reliable user authentication solution

secure.title: 🔐 Secure
secure.desc: Uses bcrypt encryption to protect your password

easy.title: ⚡ Easy to Use
easy.desc: Clean interface design, smooth user experience

oauth.title: 🌐 Social Login
oauth.desc: Support Google, GitHub and other third-party logins

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.message: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox and click the link to complete verification.
verifyEmail.expiry: The verification link is valid for 24 hours.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.message: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

messages.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please verify your email address.
messages.logoutSuccess: You have been logged out successfully.
messages.passwordResetSent: Password reset link has been sent.
messages.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successful. Please login with your new password.
messages.emailVerified: Email verified successfully! You can now login.

error.general: An error occurred. Please try again later.
error.invalidToken: Link has expired or is invalid.
error.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before logging in.

footer.copyright: User Auth System - Built with Express + LowDB
